core_logic_signatures.source:
async def _close_exchanges(self):
        """Closes exchange connections."""
        if not CCXT_AVAILABLE:
            return
        for exchange in self.exchanges.values():
            await exchange.close()
        self.exchanges.clear()

core_logic_signatures.name: _fetch_price
execute
core_logic_signatures.note: In a real telemetry pipeline, large functions can be truncated or omitted entirely in favor of the 'ast_hash' to save network bandwidth and storage costs.

core_logic_signatures.name: _fetch_price_wrapper
core_logic_signatures.source:
async def _fetch_price_wrapper(self, exchange_id: str, symbol: str):
        """Helper to unpack results for gather."""
        price = await self._fetch_price(exchange_id, symbol)
        return (exchange_id, symbol, price)
